archive_data.question_text: Which of the following State Governments organises Surajkund Mela every year?

explanation.english: The Surajkund Mela is an annual fair organized by the Government of Haryana to promote traditional crafts and cultural heritage.
explanation.tanglish: Surajkund Mela endradhu Haryana Arasaal varudathukku oru thadavai nadathappadum chadangu; idhu kai thozhil kalai matrum samudaaya sampradhayaadugalai valarpaduthum.

archive_data.question_text: The Wazir (minister) of ________ built Moth ki Masjid in Delhi.

explanation.english: Moth ki Masjid was built by the Prime Minister (Wazir) of Sikandar Lodi, named Miya Bhoia, during the Lodi dynasty period.
explanation.tanglish: Sikandar Lodi kaalathil avarudaya wazir (madhyastha) Miya Bhoia idaiyil Moth ki Masjid Delhi-il kattappattathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which is the most common tidal pattern?

explanation.english: Semi-diurnal tides, featuring two high and two low tides of approximately equal height each day, are the most common tidal pattern globally.
explanation.tanglish: Semi-diurnal tides endradhu dhinamum rendu neer yaerthalum rendu neer irakkalum samanthuvaaga varum; idhu ulagathil adhikamaga kandupidikkappadum kadal neer alai.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following dance forms belongs to the Vaishnava Monasteries of North East India?

explanation.english: Sattriya is a classical dance form that originated in the Vaishnava monasteries (sattras) of Assam in North East India.
explanation.tanglish: Sattriya aattam endradhu vadakku keel indhiya Assam-ilulla Vaishnava mathangalil (sattras) pirandha bharatha naatiya vakai.

archive_data.question_text: How many tiers of government are mentioned in the Constitution of India?

explanation.english: The Constitution of India mentions three tiers of government: Union (Central), State, and Local (Panchayat and Municipalities).
explanation.tanglish: India Arasiyal Amaippil moondru padugal (Union, State, Local/Municipalities) unarvaga koorappattullana; ithai 73rd matrum 74th saadhanathal uruthi paduthappattullathu.

archive_data.question_text: When did the Paris Agreement on Climate Change come into force (become effective from)?

explanation.english: The Paris Agreement was adopted on 12 December 2015 but entered into force on 4 November 2016 after ratification by sufficient countries.
explanation.tanglish: Paris Agreement 12th December 2015-il eduthu kolkappattathu; aanal sariyaana naadugal odungiyapinbu 4th November 2016-il nadathappattathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following is associated with the Mridangam instrument?

explanation.english: Palghat Mani Iyer was a legendary Indian percussionist renowned for his mastery of the Mridangam, a classical Carnatic drum.
explanation.tanglish: Palghat Mani Iyer endravar Mridangam vaadhiyathil parangusan petta oru periya Carnatic sangeetha vaadhiyar.
